sevenDayForecast.headline: The risk of Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji (12U) redeveloping into a tropical cyclone is Low.
points: Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji (12U) is located over the Gulf Country Queensland, and is moving west northwest.
It is forecast to move northwest for the remainder of the week, through the Gulf Country in Queensland.
12U is most likely to dissipate by the weekend, however if it hasn't dissipated it could move over Gulf of Carpentaria waters early next week or into the Coral Sea from mid-week.
There is a Low risk of 12U redeveloping into a tropical cyclone from next Monday evening.
